methodsAttempted.query: site:du.ac.in University of Delhi artificial intelligence ChatGPT generative AI policy students teachers examination
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned official University of Delhi PDFs, mostly course appendices and journal/research material rather than a central AI policy.
Search returned official-domain PDFs and repository items, including research articles and Faculty of Law magazine material; none was used for broad policy claims.

methodsAttempted.query: site:du.ac.in "Generative AI" "University of Delhi" policy academic integrity
methodsAttempted.notes: Search identified two official curriculum appendices with usable AI-specific text and several sources rejected as research, journal, magazine, or curriculum-only materials outside the final claim scope.

Direct HTTP header checks on the two selected official PDFs returned HTTP 200. robots.txt at https://www.du.ac.in/robots.txt returned 404, so no explicit robots disallow rule was found for the fetched PDFs.

artifacts.summary: Official-domain discovery did not locate a reliable public University of Delhi central AI policy. The staged claims are limited to official curriculum appendices: one College of Vocational Studies appendix teaching AI tools and prompt engineering, and one MSc Computer Science appendix requiring written permission and documentation when GenAI tools are used to create part of course code.

stopConditions: Stop after official University of Delhi sources support only narrow, source-scoped claim candidates.
Do not infer a university-wide AI policy from curriculum, journal, magazine, faculty profile, event, or research material.
If central public AI policy evidence is not found, record a no-central-policy-source limitation instead of inventing policy status.

artifacts.title: University of Delhi AI Policy Source Discovery
artifacts.summary: OpenClaw found official University of Delhi AI-related curriculum evidence but did not identify a reliable public central AI-use policy during this run. The usable staged claims are limited to a College of Vocational Studies appendix on AI tools for office management and an MSc Computer Science appendix instruction requiring prior written permission and documentation when GenAI tools are used to create part of course code.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No reliable public central University of Delhi AI-use policy source was identified in this run; official curriculum evidence should not be broadened into university-wide policy.
Rejected official-domain journal, magazine, and faculty-profile sources were not used for policy claims because they lacked directive policy specificity.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
